Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix dashboard glue layer: wire Neo4j to REST API

Findings, attack graph, and engagement summary now query Neo4j
instead of reading from empty in-memory dicts. The workflow monitor
syncs summary every 2s and emits finding/phase events. Stop endpoint
cancels the Temporal workflow. OWASP mapping queries real findings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
